verdicts.rationale: Line 2058 shows CONSTANTS version TYPE string VALUE 'v1.1.13' in zif_abapgit_ajson interface (a library embedded in the program). Line 3 shows the reference URL comment '* See http://www.abapgit.org' confirming the abapGit origin and version.
Lines 29-235 contain exactly 100 INTERFACE and CLASS DEFINITION DEFERRED declarations (verified by regex count). The claim '~100+' is accurate and matches the deferred block.

Line 152827: IF sy-batch = abap_true visible in FORM open_gui, with batch branch at line 152828 (zcl_abapgit_background=>run()) and ELSE branch at line 152829 leading to interactive GUI setup (zcl_abapgit_ui_factory=>get_gui()->go_home()).

INITIALIZATION at line 152967 calls PERFORM adjust_toolbar (line 152968) and lcl_password_dialog=>on_screen_init() (line 152969). START-OF-SELECTION at line 152971 calls PERFORM run (line 152972). FORM run (lines 152802-152820) checks authorization (line 152808) and calls PERFORM open_gui (line 152813). Complete entry flow chain verified.

Lines 152802-152820: FORM run contains TRY-CATCH (152807-152818) with three key statements: authorization check at 152808, zcl_abapgit_migrations=>run() at 152812, and PERFORM open_gui at 152813. Both CATCH blocks present (152814, 152816).
Lines 152807-152818 show TRY-CATCH block in FORM run catching zcx_abapgit_exception (line 152814) and zcx_abapgit_not_found (line 152816), both displayed as MESSAGE TYPE 'E' (lines 152815, 152817).

Lines 152822-152848 show FORM open_gui. Line 152827: IF sy-batch routing to batch mode (152828) or interactive mode (152829-152846). Lines 152842-152843: GUI preparation and go_home() call. Line 152844: CALL SELECTION-SCREEN 1001 triggers the carrier screen. Lines 152376-152378 show SELECTION-SCREEN 1001 definition (marked as dummy carrier).

Lines 152850-152876 show FORM output. Lines 152857-152858 APPEND 'CRET' and 'SPOS' to lt_ucomm (exclusion list). Lines 152860-152864 call RS_SET_SELSCREEN_STATUS with p_exclude table containing the excluded commands.

Lines 152878-152902 show FORM exit. Line 152885: IF sy-dynnr <> 1001 with RETURN ensures logic applies only to screen 1001. Lines 152890-152897: CASE sy-ucomm handling 'CBAC' OR 'CCAN' (line 152891) with back(iv_graceful=abap_true) call (line 152892) and conditional free() (line 152893) or LEAVE TO SCREEN 1001 (line 152895). Lines 152898-152899: exception handling with MESSAGE TYPE 'S' DISPLAY LIKE 'E'.

Lines 152904-152965 show FORM adjust_toolbar. Lines 152912-152926: RPY_DYNPRO_READ call with header import and exception handling. Line 152933-152934: boolc() logic sets lv_no_toolbar flag based on is_variant_maintenance() negation. Lines 152942-152963: RPY_DYNPRO_INSERT call to rewrite dynpro with toggled flag, with deliberate error ignoring (lines 152961-152962).
Grep search for 'SELECT * FROM' returns 63 occurrences, not 70 as claimed. Grep search for 'PACKAGE SIZE' returns 0 occurrences (correct). The SELECT * count is factually wrong by 7 cases.

Verified counts: 'COMMIT WORK' statements (excluding AND WAIT) = 10; 'COMMIT WORK AND WAIT' = 20; total COMMIT WORK = 30. 'ROLLBACK WORK' = 1 (confirmed, located at line 65618 as cited in evidence range 40797-131657).
Lines 152814-152817 show CATCH blocks for both zcx_abapgit_exception and zcx_abapgit_not_found in FORM run, both displaying as MESSAGE TYPE 'E'. Duplicate assertion of CL-006 with valid evidence.

Line 152808: IF zcl_abapgit_auth=>is_allowed( zif_abapgit_auth=>c_authorization-startup ) = abap_false. Line 152809: exception raised with message 'No authorization to start abapGit'. Line 152810: ENDIF closes the IF. No ELSE branch visible, confirming no bypass or fallback.

Lines 152832-152838: GET PARAMETER ID 'DBT' FIELD lv_mode (hardcoded string 'DBT', no constant). CASE lv_mode WHEN 'ZABAPGIT' (hardcoded literal, no constant defined). lv_action assignment at line 152835 uses interface constant but the activation literal 'ZABAPGIT' and parameter ID 'DBT' are hardcoded throughout.

Lines 73200-73203: METHOD list contains SELECT * FROM (c_tabname) INTO TABLE rt_content. No WHERE clause visible in the cited lines. Dynamic table name (c_tabname in parentheses) but no filtering, confirming full table read on every invocation.

Line 152393: PARAMETERS p_url TYPE string declared. Lines 152448-152478 show lcl_password_dialog=>popup() method. Line 152453: p_url = iv_repo_url (assignment from importing parameter iv_repo_url). Line 152495: LOOP AT SCREEN checking screen-name = 'P_URL' confirms use in screen field P_URL. Data flow parameter -> popup method confirmed.

Line 152398: PARAMETERS p_user TYPE string declared. Lines 152454: p_user = cv_user (assigned from CHANGING parameter). Lines 152448-152478 show lcl_password_dialog=>popup() method signature with cv_user CHANGING parameter (line 152428). Line 152521: IF p_user IS NOT INITIAL checks the field on screen. Data flow confirmed.

Line 152402: PARAMETERS p_pass TYPE c LENGTH 255 declared. Lines 152448-152478 show popup() method. Line 152452: CLEAR p_pass (clears the parameter). Lines 152471: cv_pass = p_pass (reads from parameter into CHANGING cv_pass). Line 152476: CLEAR p_pass finalizes clearing. Data flow between parameter and popup confirmed.

Line 152407: PARAMETERS p_cmnt TYPE c LENGTH 255 declared. Lines 152448-152478 show popup() method. Line 152457: p_cmnt = 'Press F1 for Help' (static text assignment). Lines 152501-152505: LOOP AT SCREEN handling screen-name = 'P_CMNT' with MODIFY SCREEN confirming use in screen field. Static text flow confirmed.
